## [12:10 - 13:28]

especially as we get closer to the end I'm not just depending on email I'm also we generally have a Facebook group it's a it's a private group just for our partners so we're communicating with them via Facebook I'm also for my top partners on closing day and and throughout the open cart I'm texting them I'm giving them updates I'm teasing them I'm pushing them I'm giving them ideas I'm just staying in touch and sometimes I even get on the phone and call them so your partner relationships are so important you don't want to just rely on email you know here save the date sure you can email them the pre-pre-stoke yeah you can email them but once you get starting into here this is it's a relationship business and don't depend just on email don't you know start up that Facebook group just for partners don't be afraid to text them and don't be afraid to call them it will make all the difference so this is prepping your partners and training your partners to create a powerful JV launch this is how you put together that launch that will just 10x your results
